title: Fresh Start MTR 4.0
description:
The official Modpack of the FSMTR Server.
It contains the minimal amount of mods that are required to join the FSMTR Server (but can of course be used outside). It features a nice cherry picked environment to build with Trains.
body:
## About the Pack
This is the official modpack for the Fresh Start MTR 4.x Server.\
Its intended use case is to be used on the FSMTR 4.x Server, although it can be used as a semi-lightweight train-centric modpack. It is neither intended nor optimized for survival mode.\
Due to the project being in the alpha/beta phase there is no additional information at the moment.\
But it for sure enhances the experience of the MTR Mod by Jonathan Ho.\
### Info about the Server
The FSMTR 4.x Server is the direct successor of the Fresh Start MTR Project.\
[https://www.freshstartmtr.site/](https://www.freshstartmtr.site/)
### Notice
From version >4.0.1 the ressourcepack will not be bundled with the modpack.
